name: aurora-ui
description: 极光流体界面风格 - 深色底、mesh gradient 极光流体、暗色毛玻璃、细亮边框、AI 原生高级感

typography.body: Inter / SF Pro Text / Helvetica Neue
typography.numbers: IBM Plex Mono / SF Mono / JetBrains Mono

prompt_template: Aurora UI style PPT slide, premium AI-native interface aesthetic, deep dark background {background}, cinematic mesh gradient aurora glow, dark frosted glass panels, accent colors {palette}, precise bento layout, thin luminous borders, ambient bloom, floating gradient orb accents, crisp modern sans-serif typography, high-end SaaS product presentation, --ar {aspect_ratio} --style raw --v 6
negative_prompt: retro, vintage, paper texture, brutalist blocks, thick black outlines, cute clay 3d, pixel art, photorealistic people, busy collage, warm beige corporate template, flat white background, rustic, hand-drawn, heavy skeuomorphic materials
